title: Comfort & Beauti
description: C&B - is my view of what minecraft should look like
body:
# Comfort & Beauti

Elevate your Minecraft experience with **Comfort & Beauti**, a carefully curated modpack designed to enhance performance and bring tranquility to your world. With a focus on smooth gameplay, cozy features, and aesthetic beauty, this pack will transform your Minecraft into a peaceful escape.

![night look like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c38a93bfc26197cb8029033f8013de2834812949.png)

## Core Features

This modpack offers a balanced blend of performance optimizations and visual enhancements, all while maintaining the essence of vanilla gameplay. The pack includes mods such as **Sodium** and **Lithium** for better performance, while **Iris** adds stunning shaders for a more immersive environment. Mods like **Visuality** and **BetterF3** polish the game's visuals and interface.

## Simplified Gameplay

Comfort & Beauti offers quality-of-life improvements with mods like **Mouse Tweaks** and **Inventory Profiles Next**, making your Minecraft experience more intuitive and efficient. With **No Chat Reports**, your multiplayer experience remains unimpeded by chat restrictions, while **Clumps** optimizes XP gathering for smoother progression.

## Performance-Focused

Thanks to mods like **ImmediatelyFast** and **FerriteCore**, Comfort & Beauti is optimized for low-end and high-end systems alike. Whether you’re building massive structures or exploring vast landscapes, the pack ensures smooth frame rates and reduced lag, without compromising on aesthetics.

## Immersive Visuals & Sounds

Enjoy a fully immersive world with **Presence Footsteps** and **Sound Physics Remastered**, which add realistic audio effects to your game. The **Resourcify** mod ensures resource packs work smoothly, while **Sodium Extra** and **Reese's Sodium Options** provide extensive customization for visuals.

## Customization at Your Fingertips

With tools like **Litematica** and **Shulker Box Tooltip**, you can build efficiently and manage your inventory with ease. The inclusion of **Mod Menu** and **Cloth Config** provides you with greater control over your mod settings, letting you fine-tune the pack to your preferences.

## Seamless Updates

Built with the latest in optimization, the modpack includes **Fabric API** and **Fabric Language Kotlin** to ensure compatibility with future updates. Mods like **Chunky** and **FastQuit** further enhance the performance of the pack, allowing you to enjoy a smooth experience from start to finish.

## The Beauty of Comfort & Beauti

The **Comfort & Beauti** modpack also brings out the best in your Minecraft world through resource packs and shaders. With **Complementary Reimagined** shaders, you can enjoy stunning lighting, shadows, and reflections, transforming your environment into a visually rich experience. This shader balances beauty and performance, ensuring smooth gameplay while enhancing the world’s aesthetics.

### Resource Packs

The modpack includes a variety of resource packs that add detail and personality to your world:

- **BetterVanillaBuilding** and **xali's Enhanced Vanilla** enhance the textures of blocks, giving a refreshed yet familiar look.
- **Better-Leaves** adds depth and realism to foliage, while **Crops-3D** and **Fancy Crops** bring life to your farms with detailed, 3D plant models.
- **Dramatic Skys** and **Alternative Rain Sounds** create a more immersive atmosphere with dynamic skies and realistic weather effects.
- **FreshAnimations** and **FA+ All Extensions** breathe life into mobs with smoother animations.
- **Redstone Tweaks** and **Correct Banner Patterns** add useful improvements to gameplay elements like redstone and banner designs.

These packs, combined with **Complementary Reimagined**, provide a visually striking and immersive Minecraft experience, while still maintaining excellent performance. Whether you’re building, exploring, or fighting, **Comfort & Beauti** ensures that your world feels vibrant, alive, and beautiful.
